nasb.text: Now it came about in the thirtieth year, on the fifth day of the fourth month, while I was by the river Chebar among the exiles, the heavens were opened and I saw visions of God.

esv.text: In the thirtieth year, in the fourth month, on the fifth day of the month, as I was among the exiles by the Chebar canal, the heavens were opened, and I saw visions of God.

cnv.text: 第三十年四月五日，我正在迦巴魯河邊的時候，天開了，我就看見　神的異象；那時，我是在被擄的人中間。

ccb.text: 第三十年四月五日，我正在迦巴鲁河畔被掳的人当中，忽然天开了，我看见了上帝的异象。
